Recurring overline (U+0305) abbreviation forms throughout all pages; τ̄ν̄ = τῶν, ο̄ν̄ = ὄντων/ὄν, κ̄αί = καί. Very frequent. Not entered individually — pattern logged here.
Lunate sigma — consistent pattern confirmed across entire ms; all word-final and medial sigma positions use C-shape. CONFIRMED SCRIBAL NORM: this scribe uses ϲ (U+03F2) universally.
Two groups of marginal annotations in left margin at approx L12-L14 and L38-L40 on f.3v. Possibly cross-references or reader notes added by second hand. Ink slightly different shade.

Clear branching tree diagram in upper-right of f.4r, occupying approx L01-L11 zone. 3 levels of nodes visible. Labels at nodes illegible at this scale. Consistent with commentary on Porphyry's Isagoge or Aristotle's Categories. Drawn in same ink as text.
